message:
test(fr-conformance): wire live oracle diff for lists + sets (br-frankenredis-ds9o, br-frankenredis-pfo5)

Adds live_redis_core_list_matches_runtime (202 non-blocking cases of
208 total; 6 BLPOP/BRPOP-style cases skipped via is_blocking_case_name
helper — they need multi-client scheduling) and
live_redis_core_set_matches_runtime (162 cases).

First-run parity vs vendored redis-server:
  - core_list: 194/202 pass, 8 divergences
  - core_set:  157/162 pass, 5 divergences

Divergences filed as [HIGH] review beads:
  - 04mo: LMPOP/LPOP/RPOP error-wording + nil-reply-shape drift
  - ozj0: SINTERCARD numkeys/LIMIT error-wording drift

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
